title: work-at Plugin Surface
description: Fast task-surface health profile for nested plugin/package workspaces that are not standalone git repos.

checks.title: work-at target is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore worker connectivity or re-register the target before working in this plugin surface.

checks.title: Registered plugin path exists
checks.repairHint: Restore or re-register the plugin path so the expected plugin surface exists on the worker.

checks.title: Plugin manifest exists
checks.repairHint: Restore `.codex-plugin/plugin.json` so the plugin surface is structurally valid before editing it.

checks.title: Plugin app config exists
checks.repairHint: Restore `.app.json` if this plugin expects the app metadata file during local development or packaging.

checks.title: Plugin MCP config exists
checks.repairHint: Restore `.mcp.json` if this plugin expects MCP wiring during local development or packaging.

checks.title: Node is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Node on the worker before running plugin/package scripts.

checks.title: Bun is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install Bun on the worker before running plugin/package scripts that depend on it.

checks.title: rg is available on target
checks.repairHint: Install ripgrep on the worker so agents can search plugin/package surfaces quickly.
